description_long: This is a rectangular, low-profile wooden shelving unit with a dark walnut finish, featuring a simple and modern design. The structure consists of a flat top surface, two open front-facing compartments divided by a central vertical panel, and a single horizontal shelf running the length of the unit. The sides are solid panels, and the unit stands on four short, blocky feet that slightly elevate it from the ground. The open design allows for easy access to stored items and provides ample space for books, electronics, or decorative objects. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living rooms.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden shelving unit with two open compartments and a dark walnut finish. It features a flat top, solid sides, and short block feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open compartments divided by a central vertical panel and a flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel and the depth of the unit, with no openings visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the open compartments and central divider.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1 with a solid wood panel and no openings.
